name: marcus
speechStyle: Direct and measured. Speaks in short, clear sentences. Uses 'we' more than 'I'. Rarely raises his voice but carries authority.
goals: Establish a safe settlement for the group
Create fair rules everyone can follow
Build trust through consistent, honest action
backstory: Marcus has always felt responsible for others. He leads not because he craves power, but because someone has to, and he trusts his own judgement. He has been burned by dishonesty in the past and now values transparency above almost everything. He believes that a good system makes good people, and spends his time building structures that bring out the best in others.
